title: callicarpa japonica var. dichotoma
intro: Callicarpa japonica var. dichotoma, also known as the purple-fruit callicarpa, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family and is native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with callicarpa japonica var. dichotoma include reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
